subcodes.first_line: O beloved friend! The Best Beloved declareth: By God, this most exalted and holy heaven requireth a ladder of sanctity whereon to tread [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حبیب محبوب میفرماید تالله این سماء قدس اعظم را سلم قدم باید تا بر او قدم گذاشته
subcodes.subjects: @banishment to; life in Adrianople, @banishments of Baha'u'llah, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
